2605.19846.title: FineBench: Benchmarking and Enhancing Vision-Language Models for Fine-grained Human Activity Understanding
2605.19846.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in general video understanding, yet they often struggle with the fine-grained comprehension crucial for real-world applications requiring nuanced interpretation of human actions and interactions. While some recent human-centric benchmarks evaluate aspects of model behaviour such as fairness/ethics, emotion perception, and broader human-centric metrics, they do not combine long-form videos, very dense QA coverage, and frame-level spatial/temporal grounding at scale. To bridge this gap, we introduce FineBench, a human-centric video question answering (VQA) benchmark specifically designed to assess fine-grained understanding. FineBench comprises 199,420 multiple-choice QA pairs densely annotated across 64 long-form videos (15 minutes each), focusing on detailed person movement, person interaction, and object manipulation, including compositional actions. Our extensive evaluation reveals that while proprietary models like GPT-5 achieve respectable performance, current open-source VLMs significantly underperform, struggling particularly with spatial reasoning in multi-person scenes and distinguishing subtle differences in human movements and interactions. To address these identified weaknesses, we propose FineAgent, a modular framework that enhances VLMs by leveraging a Localizer and a Descriptor. Experiments show that FineAgent consistently improves the performance of various open VLMs on FineBench. FineBench provides a rigorous testbed for future research into fine-grained human-centric video understanding, while FineAgent offers a practical approach to enhance such reasoning in current VLMs.
2605.19846.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在一般視頻理解方面展現了卓越的能力，然而它們在需要對人類行動和互動進行細緻解釋的現實應用中，往往難以達到細緻的理解。雖然一些近期以人為中心的基準評估了模型行為的各個方面，如公平性/倫理、情感感知以及更廣泛的人為中心指標，但它們並未在規模上結合長格式視頻、非常密集的問答覆蓋以及幀級空間/時間基準。為了填補這一空白，我們推出了FineBench，一個專門設計用於評估細緻理解的人為中心視頻問答（VQA）基準。FineBench包含199,420個多選問答對，密集註釋於64個長格式視頻（每個15分鐘），重點關注詳細的人物移動、人物互動和物體操作，包括組合行為。我們的廣泛評估顯示，雖然像GPT-5這樣的專有模型達到了可觀的性能，但目前的開源VLM在多人物場景中的空間推理和區分人類動作及互動中的微妙差異方面表現顯著不足。為了解決這些識別出的弱點，我們提出了FineAgent，一個通過利用定位器和描述符來增強VLM的模組化框架。實驗表明，FineAgent持續改善了各種開放VLM在FineBench上的性能。FineBench為未來對細緻人為中心視頻理解的研究提供了一個嚴謹的測試平台，而FineAgent則提供了一種實用的方法來增強當前VLM中的這種推理能力。
2605.19846.author: Gueter Josmy Faure et.al.
2605.19846.authors: Gueter Josmy Faure, Min-Hung Chen, Jia-Fong Yeh, Hung-Ting Su, Winston H. Hsu
